query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_orders,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN accountBalance > 0 THEN 1 END) as orders_with_balance,
  SUM(accountBalance) as total_balance
FROM orders;

SELECT customerName, accountBalance, paymentAmount, createdAt 
FROM orders 
WHERE accountBalance > 0 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
